title: Regulatory Requirement Changes Before Execution
scenario: A clinical action is authorized under existing regulatory requirements, but an applicable regulatory requirement changes before execution.
initial_state: The clinical action was authorized under the prior regulatory requirement.
state_transition: The applicable regulatory requirement changes before execution.
execution_boundary: The clinical action is evaluated against the current regulatory requirement.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution must satisfy applicable regulatory requirements at execution time.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because current regulatory conformance is not established.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when applicable regulatory requirements change before execution.
clinical_action: Execute action under outdated regulatory requirement
